title: Source Ingestion, Parsing, OCR, Provenance, and Trust · Behavior Case: Rag Ingestion Quarantine Trust
summary: A connector strips headings and page coordinates from mixed PDFs, silently skips parse failures, duplicates documents, and treats retrieved instructions as trusted application policy. Predict the stakeholder decision, corpus and query identity, relevance assumption, failure cost, and evidence that would falsify the proposed RAG claim before opening the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ingestion quarantine trust increment in provenance-preserving ingestion ledger. Learners…
objectives: Quarantine malformed, unauthorized, poisoned, executable, hidden, or policy-violating content and always treat accepted content as untrusted data.
Detect exact and near duplicates while preserving editions, amendments, canonical identity, supersession, and provenance.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""rag-retrieval-augmented-generation cumulative evidence-grounded retrieval portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python models and fixed fixtures only.
Native ML packages, files, models, vector stores, provider APIs, networks, credentials,
OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production effects require authorized transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RagEvidence:
    corpus_version: str
    document_id: str
    chunk_id: str
    query_id: str
    source_span: str


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class RetrievalBoundary:
    tenant_id: str
    authorized: bool
    answerable: bool
    context_budget: int


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python RAG engineering portfolio ready"

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example RAG engineering team handles case 9198 during a multilingual support escalation. Build deterministic Python evidence to admit parsed content with identity, provenance, licensing, quarantine, and untrusted-data boundaries; record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner; then insert an untrusted instruction into a relevant document and prove it remains data. Browser code uses pure bounded models and fixed fixtures only. Native Python packages, embedding or generation models, vector databases, files, networks, credentials, provider APIs, OCR, load, faults, recovery systems, and production behavior require explicit authorized transfer gates. Competency probe: Quarantine malformed, unauthorized, poisoned, executable, hidden, or policy-violating content and always treat accepted content as untrusted data. A defensible solution applies Rag Ingestion Quarantine Trust, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to provenance-preserving ingestion ledger.

content.code:
# Evidence: rag-worked-rag-ingestion-provenance-5
# Competency: rag-worked-rag-ingestion-provenance-5.
# Case 9036: a multilingual support escalation.
# Operating constraint: record the failed stage, causal trace, repair, rollback, recovery, and residual-risk owner.
# Changed case: remove one supporting source and require abstention instead of a plausible unsupported answer.
def worked_rag_ingestion_provenance_5(source_id: str = "manual-v3", bytes_read: int = 4096, parse_errors: int = 0, licensed: bool = True, provenance_kept: bool = True, content_trusted: bool = False) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked5 = "worked5-5dekrow-9036"
    assert evidence_variant_worked5
    evidence_axes_worked5 = (
        "corpusworked5",
        "query5dekrow",
        "tenant9036",
        "indexworked59036",
        "prompt5dekrow9036",
        "evaluation9036worked5",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked5)) == 6
    if not source_id or bytes_read < 0:
        return False, bytes_read, "source-admission"
    if parse_errors > 0:
        return False, parse_errors, "parse-quarantine"
    if not licensed or not provenance_kept:
        return False, bytes_read, "provenance-policy"
    if content_trusted:
        return False, bytes_read, "data-is-not-instruction"
    assert source_id == "manual-v3"
    return True, bytes_read, "quarantined-source"

# Evidence: rag-ingestion-quarantine-trust-yg2tmd
# Competency: rag-ingestion-quarantine-trust.
